title: BEM-841 extract variant A
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 11:22 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
items=[]
for root in ['governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt','governance/reports','governance/state','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    r=Path(root)
    if r.exists():
        for p in sorted(r.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=read(p)
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
                if 'variant a' in low or 'вариант а' in low or 'вариант a' in low or 'claude' in low and ('oauth' in low or 'anthropic' in low or 'claude_code' in low or 'secret' in low or 'app' in low):
                    items.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:2500]})
# classify likely variant A requirements from actual files
combined='\n\n'.join(x['preview'] for x in items).lower()
flags={
 'needs_claude_code_oauth_token':'claude_code_oauth_token' in combined,
 'needs_anthropic_api_key':'anthropic_api_key' in combined,
 'mentions_github_app':'github app' in combined or 'app' in combined,
 'mentions_oauth':'oauth' in combined,
 'mentions_variant_a':'variant a' in combined or 'вариант а' in combined or 'вариант a' in combined
}
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':'variant_a_evidence_extracted' if items else 'variant_a_evidence_not_found','items_found':len(items),'items':items[-20:],'flags':flags,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_extract_claude_variant_a.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_extract_claude_variant_a.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Extract Claude Variant A | '+state['status']+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: use extracted Variant A evidence to guide operator through Claude configuration, then run smoke proof. Operator relay forbidden except required external account configuration.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+state['status']+sep+'Next: configure Claude Variant A and smoke-test.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_extract_claude_variant_a.json','governance/reports/bem841_extract_claude_variant_a.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted Claude Variant A evidence from mailbox/reports/state to guide operator configuration')
